creator: mazhe@alkumuna.eu
text:
Since the snapshot r65643 of enlightement, two more snapshot + efl releases were published. In order to help the maintainer effort to update the port, I managed to update all e17-related ports, and put the result on a public git branch on github located here :

https://github.com/mazhe/e17_ports/tree/0.16.999.76819

I hope this can help to push forward a new version.

-- Mazhe

Fix: 

Feel free to pick needed parts in the branch.
How-To-Repeat: ..
